query:
SELECT 
  n.id,
  n.externalId,
  n.username,
  n.serviceStatus,
  n.address,
  n.avcId,
  n.nbnPri,
  n.nbnCsa,
  n.nbnPoi,
  n.nbnLocationId,
  n.technology,
  n.speedTier,
  n.productType,
  n.authType,
  n.ipAddress,
  n.customerRef,
  n.planName,
  n.establishmentDate,
  n.cancelDate,
  n.internalServiceExternalId,
  n.internalCustomerExternalId,
  n.matchType,
  n.matchConfidence,
  n.lastSyncedAt,
  n.createdAt,
  s.name AS matched_service_name,
  s.phoneNumber AS matched_service_phone,
  s.locationAddress AS matched_service_address,
  s.provider AS matched_service_provider,
  c.name AS matched_customer_name,
  c.businessName AS matched_customer_business,
  c.contactEmail AS matched_customer_email,
  c.contactPhone AS matched_customer_phone
FROM vocus_nbn_services n
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = n.internalServiceExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = n.internalCustomerExternalId
ORDER BY n.serviceStatus ASC, n.username ASC;
